'''dajate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:gracefully|gracefully]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-j-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:gracefully|gracefully]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dajate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:dajate|dajate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dajatesher|dajatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dajatesherĂ«m|dajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dajatero|dajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dajateshĂ«|dajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dajateshĂ«m|dajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidajatero|gokidajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidajateshĂ«|gokidajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidajateshĂ«m|gokidajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godajankerom|godajankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godajankeshĂ«|godajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godajankeshĂ«m|godajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godajankeya|godajankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dajaterom|dajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dajatemu|dajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dajateya|dajateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidajaterom|gokidajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidajatemu|gokidajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidajateya|gokidajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dajajate|dajajate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dajajatesher|dajajatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dajajatesherĂ«m|dajajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dajajatero|dajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dajajateshĂ«|dajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dajajateshĂ«m|dajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidajajatero|gokidajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidajajateshĂ«|gokidajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidajajateshĂ«m|gokidajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godajajankerom|godajajankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godajajankeshĂ«|godajajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godajajankeshĂ«m|godajajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godajajankeya|godajajankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dajajaterom|dajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dajajatemu|dajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dajajateya|dajajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidajajaterom|gokidajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidajajatemu|gokidajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidajajateya|gokidajajateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dĂŠjĂŠte|dĂŠjĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dĂŠjĂŠtesher|dĂŠjĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m|dĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠjĂŠtero|dĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|dĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|dĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠjĂŠtero|gokidĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|gokidĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godĂŠjĂŠnkerom|godĂŠjĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«|godĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godĂŠjĂŠnkeya|godĂŠjĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠjĂŠterom|dĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠjĂŠtemu|dĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dĂŠjĂŠteya|dĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠjĂŠterom|gokidĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠjĂŠtemu|gokidĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidĂŠjĂŠteya|gokidĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dafjafte|dafjafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dafjaftesher|dafjaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafjaftesherĂ«m|dafjaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafjaftero|dafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dafjafteshĂ«|dafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafjafteshĂ«m|dafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafjaftero|gokidafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidafjafteshĂ«|gokidafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafjafteshĂ«m|gokidafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godafjafnkerom|godafjafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godafjafnkeshĂ«|godafjafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godafjafnkeshĂ«m|godafjafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godafjafnkeya|godafjafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafjafterom|dafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafjaftemu|dafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dafjafteya|dafjafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafjafterom|gokidafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafjaftemu|gokidafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidafjafteya|gokidafjafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
